rules.message: A source trust policy is registered for this source.
rules.suggested_action: Keep policy metadata synchronized with the upstream source.

rules.message: No explicit source trust policy is registered.
rules.suggested_action: Add source authority, intended use, prohibited use, license, and refresh metadata before production use.

rules.message: The source is an authoritative healthcare standard.
rules.suggested_action: Preserve version and locator metadata in downstream citations.

rules.message: The source is an authoritative terminology source.
rules.suggested_action: Keep terminology changes reviewer-gated and versioned.

rules.message: The source is an authoritative classification source.
rules.suggested_action: Preserve coding context and reviewer decisions.

rules.message: The source is suitable for analytics mapping context.
rules.suggested_action: Keep analytics context separate from clinical decision support.

rules.message: The source helps literature-search routing but is not direct clinical evidence.
rules.suggested_action: Use it for query transparency, not diagnostic or treatment claims.

rules.message: The source evidence tier is unknown.
rules.suggested_action: Classify the source tier before relying on it for medical evidence.

rules.message: The source lifecycle state is approved.
rules.suggested_action: Continue monitoring freshness and index coverage.

rules.message: The source is still a candidate.
rules.suggested_action: Approve or reject the source before production retrieval.

rules.message: The source lifecycle requires review.
rules.suggested_action: Route the source through source governance review.

rules.message: The source is deprecated.
rules.suggested_action: Replace the source with a current upstream release.

rules.message: The source lifecycle state blocks retrieval use.
rules.suggested_action: Keep this source out of retrieval until governance clears it.

rules.message: A reviewer approved this source state.
rules.suggested_action: Keep the reviewer decision visible in source lineage.

rules.message: The source reviewer state is not approved.
rules.suggested_action: Complete reviewer approval before production use.

rules.message: The reviewer state blocks source use.
rules.suggested_action: Remove this source from retrieval until reviewer issues are resolved.

rules.message: The source passes the freshness gate.
rules.suggested_action: Use with normal citation and review controls.

rules.message: The source needs operational follow-up.
rules.suggested_action: Refresh or index the source before relying on it broadly.

rules.message: The source freshness gate requires review.
rules.suggested_action: Resolve policy, lifecycle, or reviewer gaps before production use.

rules.message: The source is blocked by the freshness gate.
rules.suggested_action: Do not use this source for retrieval until the block is cleared.

rules.message: The source has both indexed chunks and manifest lineage.
rules.suggested_action: Continue using ingestion ledger metadata for citations and audits.

rules.message: The source is indexed but lacks current manifest lineage.
rules.suggested_action: Rebuild the ingestion manifest and ledger for this source.

rules.message: The source has observed input artifacts but no indexed chunks.
rules.suggested_action: Run corpus reindex after source approval.

rules.message: The source is configured but has no indexed coverage.
rules.suggested_action: Index approved source snapshots before relying on this source.

rules.message: The source points to an external upstream location without a governed local snapshot.
rules.suggested_action: Create a reviewed source snapshot or use a transparent external-search handoff.

rules.message: The source is outside its freshness window.
rules.suggested_action: Refresh or re-ingest the source before treating it as authoritative.

rules.message: Approved source input is not currently indexed.
rules.suggested_action: Run corpus reindex for approved local snapshots.

rules.message: The indexed source is missing a governed adapter entry.
rules.suggested_action: Register the source adapter before relying on retrieved chunks.

rules.message: The source adapter is disabled.
rules.suggested_action: Do not retrieve this source until the adapter is intentionally enabled.

rules.message: The source has account or license constraints.
rules.suggested_action: Verify enterprise rights before ingesting or redistributing source content.

rules.message: The source policy restricts clinical, billing, diagnostic, or treatment use.
rules.suggested_action: Keep downstream use review-gated and avoid clinical decision-support claims.

rules.message: The source has privacy, distribution, or publication constraints.
rules.suggested_action: Preserve license metadata and avoid committing restricted source payloads.
